storyInfo: Visiting Messengers talk about Higashinese legends as they deliver goods to Rhodes Island, but Utage observes their every movement from the shadows.

attributes.text: Long, long ago...
\n\nWar raged across Higashi, with many ambitious warlords lording over their own territories.
\n\nThis is a story that takes place in one of these territories of no particular note, on a night of no particular note.
\n\nSeveral Bugyous patrol the empty city streets, carrying lanterns in one hand, gripping sword hilts with the other.
The houses that line the street are completely silent. Perhaps they have been abandoned, or perhaps their residents simply dare not make a sound.
\n\nDisease and war have made the city a bleak and gloomy place.
\n\nThe Bugyous are used to nights like this, and continue to solemnly carry out their duties.
\n\nThe daimyo who rules over the city is strong, wise, and virtuous. But even the greatest leader cannot make food and medicine appear out of thin air.
What fate awaits this city?
\n\nNo one discusses it, but the same answer is on everyone's minds.

attributes.content: Hey, do you hear something?
attributes.name: Bugyou A

attributes.content: What?
attributes.name: Bugyou B

attributes.content: I think it's coming from the rooftops.
attributes.name: Bugyou A

attributes.text: The Bugyous look up, hoping to find the wind or some kind of small, harmless animal, in a time of war like this.
\n\nWhat they find is a humanoid silhouette with a hunched back, thick limbs, long fur growing from its body, and a tail winding and twisting as though it has a mind of its own.
The strange monster hides on the rooftops, its face shadowed, with only a pair of lilac eyes staring at the Bugyous with a gleam of malice.
\n\nThe Bugyous stare in stunned silence, daring not to avert their eyes, nor make a single movement...
Until the monster lets out an eerie, earsplitting cry.

attributes.content: Kusooooo!
attributes.name: Bugyou A

attributes.content: What is that thing?!
attributes.name: Bugyou A

attributes.content: A-Accursed monster!
attributes.name: Bugyou B

attributes.content: Drive it away!
attributes.name: Bugyou A

attributes.content: (Roars)
attributes.name: Unknown Monster

attributes.content: You've angered it!
attributes.name: Bugyou B

attributes.text: The monster leaps, its purple eyes drawing a curve in the night sky, landing beside the Bugyous.
\n\nIt swings its massive claws without hesitation at the Bugyou trying to shoot it.
\n\nThe blow sends the Bugyou flying. He does not make a sound as he impacts a house by the street, causing it to collapse.
The other Bugyous attempt to scatter, but the monster's attacks are relentless.
\n\nSoon, only a single young Bugyou is left to face the monster, his sword offering little comfort in the face of such a foe.
\n\nHis legs tremble. Unable to flee, all he can do is await his inevitable death.
With a roar, the monster bares its fangs and charges at him, the ground rumbling under its thick limbs.
Yet the flash of a blade coming down from the roof is even faster. The monster takes a couple of steps back, its arm injured, showing fear for the first time.
\n\nThe daimyo himself has come, sword in hand.

attributes.content: A-Aruji-dono! You should not be here! It's dangerous!
attributes.name: Bugyou C

attributes.content: Vile monster! You'll pay for the harm you have done to my people!
attributes.name: Daimyo

attributes.text: The brave daimyo has the upper hand at first, but he is mortal flesh and blood, and his strength alone is insufficient to overcome the mysterious creature.
\n\nEven as the daimyo's sword cuts the creature's flesh and draws its blood, its attacks do not cease.
\n\nThe monster's black claw wounds the daimyo, and corrupt blood seeps into his body, draining the last bit of his strength.
As the daimyo falls to the ground, he sees a figure charging the fleeing monster.
It is the young Bugyou, who has mustered the courage to strike at the monster with no regard for his own safety, impaling its heart with his sword.
The monster's corpse hits the ground, and the night is silent once more. The smell of blood is the only reminder that remains of the terrible battle that just occurred.
The daimyo bestowed his own sword upon the young Bugyou, in recognition of the courage he displayed.
\n\nThe young Bugyou became the daimyo's personal guard, and was granted the name of Nuegiri, an honor that would be passed down from generation to generation.
\n\nThe daimyo himself contracted Oripathy that night.
The accursed illness invoked by the accursed beast did not crush the daimyo's virtuous heart. Knowing that his days were numbered, he devoted his last days to improving the lot of his city.
\n\nHis son inherited his will and continued to develop the city, overcoming challenging times to enter an era of prosperity.
The mysterious monster, the Nue, became a local legend.
\n\nThe Nue would appear periodically, announcing its arrival with its ominous call, whereupon the descendants of Nuegiri would pursue and kill it.
\n\nDefeating the Nue drives out bad luck and brings good fortune.

attributes.content: Rhodes Island Liaison Office
So that's the Higashinese Legend of Nuegiri?
attributes.name: Curious Messenger

attributes.content: Yeah. They say that the Nuegiri clan continues to protect a certain prominent Higashinese clan, driving misfortune away and bringing in good fortune.
attributes.name: Talkative Messenger

attributes.content: But there's no record of this daimyo, or what city he ruled.
attributes.name: Curious Messenger

attributes.content: That's because it's legend.
attributes.name: Talkative Messenger

attributes.content: The goods check out just fine. Same corridor as usual.
attributes.name: Rhodes Island Cargo Manager

attributes.content: Take a left at that corner there and you'll see a red sign marking the cargo elevator. Closure's storage room is two floors up.
attributes.name: Rhodes Island Cargo Manager

attributes.content: There are three security checkpoints along the way. Just follow the signs and listen to staff instructions.
attributes.name: Rhodes Island Cargo Manager

attributes.content: You Rhodes Islanders always have so much red tape. Can't we do that 'package for you, just sign here' stuff? Alright, I'll go through the waybills. You go and deliver the goods.
attributes.name: Curious Messenger

attributes.content: Me?
attributes.name: Talkative Messenger

attributes.content: Quit babbling and go. Be careful not to get lost. Heaven knows the corridors in this place still confuse me, even though I've been here a bunch of times.
attributes.name: Curious Messenger

attributes.content: I'll be going, then.
attributes.name: Talkative Messenger

attributes.content: A new Messenger? He's got the look of a first-timer.
attributes.name: Rhodes Island Cargo Manager

attributes.content: That's what this job's like. People come and go all the time. You know how hard logistics work is, with all the dangers out there.
attributes.name: Curious Messenger

attributes.content: What about your old partner, that Parker kid? Did he quit?
attributes.name: Rhodes Island Cargo Manager

attributes.content: He tangled with some beasts on a solo delivery, so he's gone back home to Rim Billiton to recuperate. Not sure how serious it is.
attributes.name: Curious Messenger

attributes.content: Well, glad he's alive, at least.
attributes.name: Rhodes Island Cargo Manager

attributes.content: Which is why I got a new partner.
attributes.name: Curious Messenger

attributes.content: Uh...
attributes.name: Talkative Messenger

attributes.content: (All the corridors look the same... I'm lost, aren't I?)
attributes.name: Talkative Messenger

attributes.content: There isn't a single soul in sight. How did I even end up here, anyway?
attributes.name: Talkative Messenger

attributes.content: Are you delivering to Closure's storage room?
Do you need a guide?
attributes.name: Utage

attributes.content: Oh, a schoolgirl? Thank you. Are you a patient here?
attributes.name: Talkative Messenger

attributes.content: An operator too. Wanna see my hall pass?
attributes.name: Utage

attributes.content: Sorry, I just made assumptions because you look so young. May I trouble you to show me the way, then?
attributes.name: Talkative Messenger

attributes.content: No prob. Lemme just...
attributes.name: Utage

attributes.content: Hey, you can't take that box!
attributes.name: Talkative Messenger

attributes.content: Why not? It's for me.
attributes.name: Utage

attributes.content: But this stuff still needs to go through Rhodes Island's security checks—
attributes.name: Talkative Messenger

attributes.content: I take care of it myself. Lookie—'Utage,' 'Cosmetics Series.' Happy? Or you think it might be an Originium bomb? How about I open it in front of you?
attributes.name: Utage

attributes.content: Well, there's no need for that... it's just... procedure... uh...
attributes.name: Talkative Messenger

attributes.content: Flip around and walk straight until you hit the third door. Take the corner a good twenty meters after that, turn right, then pop down the corridor on the left and walk thirty meters.
attributes.name: Utage

attributes.content: Off you go, now. I got training. Byeee.
attributes.name: Utage

attributes.content: Wait, don't—
attributes.name: Talkative Messenger

attributes.content: Is that what Rhodes Island operators are like? I guess 'free spirit' is the word for it...
attributes.name: Talkative Messenger

attributes.content: I should tell the people at security that this operator named Utage took one of the packages.
attributes.name: Talkative Messenger

attributes.content: Alright, let's move...
attributes.name: Talkative Messenger

attributes.content: The Messenger does not realize that Utage has not left. She is hiding behind a corner, just out of sight.
Utage holds the box like it is the most precious thing she has ever held.
She follows behind the Messenger, completely silent.
So, you're really into Higashinese myths and legends?
attributes.name: Rhodes Island Cargo Manager

attributes.content: Of course. That's why I became a Messenger, to see and learn new things. I ask people for local stories wherever I go.
attributes.name: Curious Messenger

attributes.content: Sounds like a Messenger thing alright. Although, I've actually heard a different version of the Nuegiri legend.
attributes.name: Rhodes Island Cargo Manager

attributes.content: Oh? Let's hear it.
attributes.name: Curious Messenger

attributes.content: Well—
attributes.name: Rhodes Island Cargo Manager

attributes.text: The story takes place in the same city, but in this story, the daimyo was not a paragon of virtue and selflessness.
\n\nHe was short-sighted and arrogant, little different from the bandits in the hills.
\n\nHe was cruel and brutal, and carried a hatred of all ill omens.
He loathed the Infected, stopping at nothing to eliminate any he discovered.
\n\nThe daimyo's reign over his territory was one of terror and misery.

\n\nThings came to a head when the daimyo was attacked by the Infected in a riot. Driven to desperation, the Infected had set a trap for the daimyo, who managed to escape, but not before contracting Oripathy himself.
The daimyo slew his assassins, then threw his sword, stained with Infected blood, to the ground in disgust.
\n\nHe could not accept his end, to be brought down by a filthy peasant illness.
He ordered his servants, the Nuegiri clan, to protect everything he had—his city, his family, his status, and his reputation.
The Nuegiri were no longer just the guardians of the daimyo. They were also tasked with eliminating all the 'Nue' in the daimyo's eyes—
\n\nBe it people, armies, or Catastrophes.
\n\nTo those on the outside, they were killing some kind of mysterious monster that threatened them.
The duty of the Nuegiri became a curse, a cycle.
\n\nA cycle they repeated generation after generation.
\n\nCountless innocent souls were branded 'Nue' simply because they learned the truth, and were eliminated in order to hide it.

attributes.content: Today, the city is gone, but it is said that the Nuegiri clan still exists, operating in the shadows.
attributes.name: Rhodes Island Cargo Manager

attributes.content: Taken under the wing of a major Higashinese clan, they continue to perform their ancestral duties, eliminating all 'Nue' so dubbed by their master.
attributes.name: Rhodes Island Cargo Manager

attributes.content: ...That's the version I know.
attributes.name: Rhodes Island Cargo Manager

attributes.content: Such a wildly different story. Fascinating.
attributes.name: Curious Messenger

attributes.options: Interesting topic of conversation.;...;Is that the end of the story?

attributes.content: Doctor! When did you come in?
attributes.name: Rhodes Island Cargo Manager

attributes.options: The part about the daimyo being cruel and brutal.

attributes.content: Oh, er, don't take it too seriously. I heard it in passing and I can't vouch for its authenticity.
attributes.name: Rhodes Island Cargo Manager

attributes.content: It's just a story. What's a good story without a bit of exaggeration?
attributes.name: Curious Messenger

attributes.content: Why hasn't the new guy come back yet, though?
attributes.name: Curious Messenger

attributes.content: Are you here because you're expecting something important, Doctor?
attributes.name: Rhodes Island Cargo Manager

attributes.options: There are a few reports scheduled to be delivered today.

attributes.content: I'm done with the waybills here. We need to go see Closure.
attributes.name: Rhodes Island Cargo Manager

attributes.content: Did that slowpoke really get lost? I'm gonna have words for him.
attributes.name: Curious Messenger

attributes.content: Huh? What's that?
attributes.name: Curious Messenger

attributes.content: What's going on?!
attributes.name: Rhodes Island Cargo Manager

attributes.options: An alarm from the storage room.

attributes.content: There are several operators standing by in the corridor leading to Closure's storage room.
Someone tripped the thermal alarms. Possible use of combat Arts in the area.
attributes.name: Rhodes Island Guard

attributes.content: But there's no sign of fighting, only a cartful of goods.
attributes.name: Rhodes Island Guard

attributes.content: That's the packages we brought in today! There should be a Messenger too. Where is he?
attributes.name: Curious Messenger

attributes.content: The operator shakes his head.
We're investigating the incident, Doctor. Please stay with us and be on guard.
attributes.name: Rhodes Island Guard

attributes.content: Doctor?
attributes.name: Rhodes Island Guard

attributes.content: A grown man doesn't just vanish into thin air like that, right?
attributes.name: Curious Messenger

attributes.content: The Doctor crouches by the side of the cart, catching a slight whiff of a certain scent.
A minute, sweet scent.
(Well, that was annoying.)
attributes.name: Utage

attributes.content: Utage looks down at the slightly dented cardboard box in her hands as she mutters irritably.
(I'm pissed.)
attributes.name: Utage

attributes.content: Agh! What a pain!
attributes.name: Utage

attributes.content: Utage puts the package on the table, along with her katana.
With her painstakingly-painted nail-adorned fingers, she takes a small knife and cuts the cardboard box open, revealing a tiny component between the layers of cardboard.
It is a delicate component connected to a tiny Originium battery.
Utage stares at the component. The smile is gone from her face.
Hello? Do you hear me?
attributes.name: Utage

attributes.content: Utage starts talking to the component, obviously a covert listening device.

attributes.text: Back in the secret manor, she knew nothing of duty or responsibility; she was simply raised according to the elders' plans.
\n\nShe did not know what lay outside the manor's walls; she did not even know enough to be curious.
\n\nFor better or for worse, she demonstrated outstanding aptitude and easily passed the Nuegiri clan's rigorous training regimen.
She received her mission—
\n\nBecome an ordinary Higashinese citizen, an ordinary high-schooler who likes to look good, a Rhodes Islander who keeps a low profile, and eliminate the 'Nue' in the name of her master.
It was an easy assignment. No one would ever find out who she was.
\n\nHer parents and the rest of the family had no doubt that she would become the next leader of the Nuegiri clan.
\n\nThe final step to becoming leader was to complete her mission at Rhodes Island.

attributes.content: Doctor, we found the Messenger leaning against a door, far off his route.
attributes.name: Rhodes Island Guard

attributes.content: He was unconscious, cause unknown.
attributes.name: Rhodes Island Guard

attributes.options: Take him to the lounge and let him rest.

attributes.content: But... if he—
attributes.name: Rhodes Island Guard

attributes.content: This really couldn't be more suspicious—
attributes.name: Rhodes Island Guard

attributes.options: Trust me, everything will be alright.
I've checked the area. No sign of anyone.

attributes.content: ...If you say so, Doctor. We'll take him to the lounge.
attributes.name: Rhodes Island Guard

attributes.options: Get the other operators out of here too.
There was no foul play here.;I'll file the records.

attributes.content: I'm only gonna say this once. Doesn't really matter, since you're gonna record it anyway.
attributes.name: Utage

attributes.content: ...Ahem.
attributes.name: Utage

attributes.content: I love my life here. I love hanging out with my friends. Everything on Rhodes Island is awesome, way better than the old manor.
attributes.name: Utage

attributes.content: Oh, I don't like training, but I loooooove skipping it.
attributes.name: Utage

attributes.content: Which is why—
attributes.name: Utage

attributes.content: If you send a spy to Rhodes Island, I'm gonna pick him out in like, five seconds.
attributes.name: Utage

attributes.content: I don't care which of you is into Rhodes. If you ever pull funny business like this again—
attributes.name: Utage

attributes.content: I'll be back to pay Clan Nuegiri a visit. And then, there won't be a Clan Nuegiri anymore.
attributes.name: Utage

attributes.content: Say hi to Mama and Papa for me.
attributes.name: Utage

attributes.content: Utage pivots as she draws her katana.
Cut cleanly in half, the pieces of the listening device fall into the trash can.
That stupid Messenger just had to try and fight back! He made me spill all this loose powder!
attributes.name: Utage

attributes.content: Maybe I should've given it a bit before slicing the bug. Could've had the folks back home teach him a lesson.
attributes.name: Utage

attributes.content: Gah! I'm PISSED!
attributes.name: Utage

attributes.content: Utage does not want to be an assassin or a spy, nor carry the burden of whatever 'ancestral duty' her clan keeps babbling about.
Utage does not like training. Being an operator can be rather exhausting, after all.
All she wants to be is a high-schooler, a real Higashinese JK.
Hey! Kirara!
attributes.name: Utage

attributes.content: Utage-chan!
attributes.name: Kirara

attributes.content: What's that? The latest issue?
attributes.name: Utage

attributes.content: No way you're reading it without me!
attributes.name: Utage

attributes.content: Of course I'm not... I just got it.
attributes.name: Kirara

attributes.content: Well, whatever. Let's hit up your room and I'll try out some new cosmetics on you!
attributes.name: Utage

attributes.content: A-Again...?
attributes.name: Kirara
